description: Transition from local deployments to highly scalable, resilient cloud architectures. This roadmap focuses on provisioning, securing, and maintaining core compute, storage, relational databases, and serverless compute primitives using enterprise-grade Infrastructure as Code (IaC).

topics.title: Infrastructure as Code (IaC) Foundations
topics.note: Avoid using the AWS Console manually. You will learn to provision every single AWS resource declaratively using Terraform.

subtopics.title: Install Terraform and configure the AWS provider along with secure IAM access keys locally
resources: HashiCorp Learn: Terraform AWS Getting Started

subtopics.title: Manage Terraform remote state files securely inside an S3 bucket configured with DynamoDB-backed state locking
Architect an isolated Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) from scratch including public/private subnets, Internet Gateways, and NAT Gateways via Terraform

topics.title: Cloud Compute (EC2 & Advanced Infrastructure)
topics.note: Master secure compute node instances, firewall routing rules, and elastic load balancing policies.

subtopics.title: Provision an EC2 instance inside a private subnet and set up secure access through an AWS Systems Manager (SSM) Session Manager tunnel instead of open SSH keys
resources: AWS Systems Manager User Guide: Eliminating Bastion Hosts

subtopics.title: Configure explicit Security Groups and Network Access Control Lists (NACLs) to strictly isolate compute ingress and egress paths
resources: AWS Security Group vs NACL: Control Rules Deep-Dive

subtopics.title: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB) routing live traffic across an Auto Scaling Group (ASG) of EC2 instances scaling on CPU performance triggers
resources: Elastic Load Balancing and Auto Scaling Architecture Guide

topics.title: Object Storage (S3)
topics.note: Go beyond basic file hosting to address structural security data compliance, policies, and low-latency distribution channels.

subtopics.title: Provision a secure Amazon S3 bucket enforced with default KMS server-side encryption and Block Public Access controls
resources: Amazon S3 Security Best Practices and Encryption Modes

subtopics.title: Author fine-grained IAM Policies and S3 Bucket Policies granting strictly scoped least-privilege file access to your app's compute role
resources: AWS IAM Policies Evaluation Logic Blueprint

subtopics.title: Configure S3 Lifecycle Rules to automatically transition older diagnostic logs or data chunks down into cost-effective glacier storage classes
resources: Managing Storage Lifecycles with Amazon S3 Lifecycle Configurations

topics.title: Managed Relational Databases (RDS)
topics.note: Handle transactional persistence layers by provisioning multi-availability zone database deployments.

subtopics.title: Provision an Amazon RDS PostgreSQL cluster inside isolated private database subnets with automated daily snapshot configurations
resources: Amazon RDS User Guide: Subnet Groups Configurations

subtopics.title: Configure high-availability RDS Multi-AZ deployments with Read Replicas to seamlessly handle automatic failover and optimize high read traffic volumes
resources: RDS Multi-AZ Deployments Architecture and Failover Logic

subtopics.title: Integrate AWS Secrets Manager into your backend stack to automatically rotate database credentials without breaking application runtimes
resources: AWS Secrets Manager: Rotating Database Credentials Safely

topics.title: Serverless Architectures (Lambda & API Gateway)
topics.note: Master ephemeral event-driven compute models, addressing cold-start considerations and request routing systems.

subtopics.title: Author an event-driven AWS Lambda function using Python to automatically compress images immediately upon arrival into an S3 upload bucket
resources: AWS Lambda Developer Guide: Using AWS Lambda with Amazon S3

subtopics.title: Expose serverless runtimes to the web using Amazon API Gateway HTTP APIs, setting up custom authorization routes and cors controls
resources: Building Routing Topologies with Amazon API Gateway

subtopics.title: Package your Python dependencies as a custom AWS Lambda Layer or deploy your function inside a Docker container using Lambda container image support to bypass file size limitations
resources: Deploying Lambda Functions as Container Images

topics.title: Cloud Production Capstone Engineering
topics.note: Synthesize your full application infrastructure stack entirely via code definitions targeting cloud environments.

subtopics.title: Write a unified Terraform configuration that provisions a production-ready VPC, an RDS PostgreSQL database instance, an S3 bucket, and an EC2 scaling layer
Deploy your Django/FastAPI backend to an EC2 auto-scaling fleet behind an Application Load Balancer, connecting it directly to your RDS database and S3 asset pipeline
resources: Production Checklist for Deploying Python Backends on AWS

subtopics.title: Offload high-overhead background workflows (such as periodic data scraping or batch AI model evaluation tasks) out to AWS Lambda endpoints triggered via Amazon EventBridge chron schedules
resources: Creating Cron Schedules using Amazon EventBridge Rules
